name: wpa-sycophant
title: wpa-sycophant
summary: tool to relay phase 2 authentication attempts to access corporate wireless
description:
tool to relay phase 2 authentication attempts to access corporate wireless
This package contains a tool to relay phase 2 authentication attempts to
access corporate wireless without cracking the password.
.
To use this technique it is required that you run a rogue access point so that
a legitimate user will connect to you so that you may relay the authentication
attempt to Sycophant.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use wpa_sycophant because tool to relay phase 2 authentication attempts to access corporate wireless.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use wpa_sycophant as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `wpa_sycophant [options] [args]` as documented upstream for wpa_sycophant.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair wpa_sycophant with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `wpa_sycophant --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
